sourceMovie.title: Brüno
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Brüno for the same reason it broke through in 2009: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a comedy rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Larry Charles keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Scary Movie
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Brüno clicked for you, Scary Movie (2000) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Brüno?
faq.answer: Try Scary Movie, Borat: Cultural Learnings of America for Make Benefit Glorious Nation of Kazakhstan, Pitch Perfect 2—each shares DNA with Brüno while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Brüno?
faq.answer: Brüno (2009) is best described as Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Brüno worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
